fields.name: iPhone 16 Pro Max
fields.description: Apple flagship with A18 Pro chip and titanium design. Features a 6.9 inch Super Retina XDR display with ProMotion. Professional camera system with 5x optical zoom.

fields.name: iPhone 15 Pro
fields.description: Pro-grade Apple smartphone with action button and A17 Pro chip. Crafted from titanium for a lighter premium feel. Supports USB-C with USB 3 speeds.

fields.name: Samsung Galaxy S24
fields.description: Samsung flagship with Galaxy AI and a brilliant 6.7 inch Dynamic AMOLED display. Powered by Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 for lightning-fast performance.

fields.name: POCO F7 Pro
fields.description: High-performance mid-range phone focused on gaming and speed. Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 chip with a 6.67 inch 144 Hz AMOLED display.

fields.name: Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro
fields.description: Budget champion with a large 5500 mAh battery and capable cameras. 200 MP main sensor delivers stunning detail in photos.

fields.name: Apple MacBook Air M3
fields.description: Ultra-thin laptop powered by Apple M3 chip with all-day 18-hour battery life. Stunning 15.3 inch Liquid Retina display with 500 nits brightness.

fields.name: ASUS VivoBook 15
fields.description: Slim everyday laptop with AMD Ryzen processor and a Full HD display. Lightweight design at just 1.7 kg perfect for students.

fields.name: Lenovo IdeaPad 3
fields.description: Reliable student laptop with Intel Core processor and ample storage. Narrow bezels maximize the 15.6 inch screen real estate.

fields.name: HP Pavilion 15
fields.description: Stylish HP laptop with dedicated AMD Radeon graphics for light gaming. Micro-edge display with thin bezels on all four sides.

fields.name: Acer Aspire 5
fields.description: Well-rounded laptop for everyday productivity and study. Vibrant 14 inch IPS display with wide viewing angles.

fields.name: Sony WH-1000XM5
fields.description: Industry-leading noise-cancelling over-ear headphones with 30-hour battery. Eight microphones deliver exceptional ANC performance.

fields.name: Apple AirPods Pro 2
fields.description: Adaptive audio and top-tier ANC in compact earbuds with H2 chip. Personalized Spatial Audio creates an immersive 3D sound experience.

fields.name: JBL Tune 770NC
fields.description: Comfortable wireless headphones with active noise cancelling and 70-hour battery. Adaptive ANC automatically adjusts to your surroundings.

fields.name: Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro
fields.description: Premium earbuds with Hi-Fi 24-bit audio and a compact ergonomic design. Intelligent ANC blocks up to 97 percent of background noise.

fields.name: Xiaomi Redmi Buds 5 Pro
fields.description: Budget ANC earbuds with an impressive 43 dB noise reduction rating. Three microphones per earbud ensure crystal-clear call quality.

fields.name: Apple iPad Air M2
fields.description: Powerful tablet with M2 chip perfect for creative work and study. Stunning 11 inch Liquid Retina display with True Tone and P3 wide color.

fields.name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9
fields.description: Premium Android tablet with a vivid AMOLED display and included S Pen. IP68 water and dust resistance for worry-free use anywhere.

fields.name: Xiaomi Pad 6
fields.description: High-performance tablet with Snapdragon 870 and a 144 Hz display. Large 8840 mAh battery keeps you going through full workdays.

fields.name: Lenovo Tab P12
fields.description: Versatile large-screen tablet for entertainment and productivity tasks. Massive 12.7 inch display is ideal for movies reading and video calls.

fields.name: Huawei MatePad 11.5
fields.description: Stunning 11.5 inch PaperMatte display tablet ideal for studying and media. Anti-glare matte screen dramatically reduces eye strain during long sessions.
